creator: ecrist@secure-computing.net
text:
The timestamp for pkg-mesg is 1969 - looks wrong.  Otherwise, your  
ports-foo is greater than mine...

Also, I've got a google code site under the name ssl-admin as well for  
master-site. {$GOOGLECODE} or something was the macro.  I need to  
update the package there, but will do so now.  Having problems with my  
server this week (hardware failures).

Eric


On Jul 25, 2008, at 5:51 PM, Beech Rintoul wrote:

> Use tabs not spaces after a variable.
> Use DISTVERSION for beta version.
> Use SUB_FILES for pkg-message
> Fix pkg-plist to properly handle deinstall of config files.
> Minor Makefile tweaks.
>
> Diff attached, please approve.
>
> Beech
> --
